creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
On Tue, 9 Aug 2011 07:41:29 +0000
"Sergey A. Osokin" <osa@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> I can't reproduced this issue with following environment:
> 
> % pkg_info -c ruby\*
> Information for ruby-1.9.2.136,1:
> 
> Comment:
> An object-oriented interpreted scripting language
> 
> % ls -ald /var/db/pkg/ruby*
> drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  512   9 Aug
> 10:55 /var/db/pkg/ruby-1.9.2.136,1
> 
> % ls -al /usr/local/bin/ruby*
> -rwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  4020  9 Aug 10:55 /usr/local/bin/ruby
> -rwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  4020  9 Aug 10:55 /usr/local/bin/ruby19
> 
> % ls -al /usr/local/bin/rake*
> -rwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  1252  9 Aug 10:55 /usr/local/bin/rake
> -rwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  1252  9 Aug 10:55 /usr/local/bin/rake19
> 
> % cat /etc/make.conf | grep -i ruby
> RUBY_DEFAULT_VER=1.9
> 
> Could you please remove needless ruby 1.8 before build www/nginx with
> passenger module.

Got me confused.
Are you reffering to me, or some tinterbox admin...?

I don't have ruby 1.8 on my server, only ruby 1.9

-- 
Aldis Berjoza
